text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash's two strongest opponents at the
spring Tenno Sho are Manhattan Cafe and Zenno
Rob Roy. Suddenly compelled, she boldly
approaches them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And issues them a challenge. This sudden
declaration is brought on by her newfound desire
to run for the thrill of the action.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of them will race down this
3,200-meter path to prove whose reason for
racing is "right."
